summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pura Livn landing page - all major functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI components, contact form, and external Shopify integrations
passed_tests: Backend /api/contact accepts valid submissions and saves to MongoDB
Backend contact form validation (422 errors for missing fields)
Promo bar visible with FREE SHIPPING text and FIRSTORDER10 code with copy button
Hero section loads with 'Empowering Confidence Through Self-Care' heading
Shop Bestsellers button links to correct Shopify URL with target=_blank
Learn the Ritual button present and functional
Mission section with 'Beauty Starts with Skincare' heading and Our Promise/Ingredients cards
4 product cards displayed with correct prices ($24.99, $39.99, $39.99, View Price)
All product Shop Now buttons link to correct Shopify URLs with target=_blank
Benefits section with 3 benefit cards (Massage-Activated Results, Collagen-Infused Hydration, Boosts Circulation Feel)
Support section with lifestyle image and Get Yours Today CTA linking to Shopify kit
3 testimonial cards showing Jessica K., Maria G., Melissa R. quotes
2 blog cards with titles linking to Shopify blog URLs
Contact form validation - empty form shows error messages
Contact form successful submission with valid data and success toast
Footer with shop links, company links, copyright, and 3 policy links
